untranslatable_reason: Signal requires regime classification (BULL_MARKET_UP_BREAKOUT, BEAR_MARKET_UP_BREAKOUT, etc.) with differential performance metrics that cannot be expressed as simple indicator conditions. Performance data is regime-specific but exit conditions are marked AUTHOR_SILENT with incomplete parameter definitions.
translation_notes: Translated core breakout logic using closing price relative to 50-day MA and candle color confirmation (body direction). Entry conditions capture breakout above/below sma_50 with color confirmation. Exit uses reversal through moving average. Stop loss set to worst-case bear market down breakout performance (-10.61%). Actual performance varies significantly by market regime and breakout direction per source table, but these variations cannot be encoded in standard indicator conditions without additional regime classification input.
